matches.csv.description: SofaScore league fixtures; one row per match_id in the season export.
columns: Unix kickoff time (UTC as provided by source)
Final goals home (empty if not played)

goals.csv.description: One row per goal in a league match; match_id joins to matches.csv.
columns: Extra minute in stoppage (often empty in older seasons)
SofaScore player id (empty if not resolved)
True if scorer's team was home
Running score for home team after this goal
Running score for away team after this goal

tff_auxiliary.location: archive/11-12_tff/ (not inside season folders; season 11-12 matches other years' CSV set).
tff_auxiliary.tff_mac_to_match_id.csv: Maps TFF macId (2011-12 scrape) to SofaScore match_id; round_tff from archive.
tff_auxiliary.tff_kisi_to_player_id.csv: Maps TFF person id to SofaScore player_id after merge heuristics.
tff_auxiliary.tff_kisi_to_player_id_overrides.csv: Under tff_mappings/: manual overrides tff_kisi_id, player_id (edit and re-run merge script).
tff_auxiliary.kulup_to_team_id_1112.csv: TFF kulup id to SofaScore team_id for 2011-12.
tff_auxiliary.goals_tff_super_final.csv: Goals from TFF Spor Toto Super Final playoff (not league fixtures).
